Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Continued To Aug-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Noell Kubota for Maurice Daniels.

Mr. Kubota stated that he filed the Petition for Final Distribution this morning with a August 16, 2011 hearing date. The status hearing was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Continued To Jul-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Noell Kubota for Administrator.

The Court noted that it understood that Mr. Kubota was still waiting for $675.00, stated that it did not think that this holds up the distribution and that it would be distributed as part of the obnibus clause. The matter was continued to July 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing the petition for final distribution.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
